Variables.Name: bShouldLoop
Variables.Description: This only works if bTeleportToTargetTime is false OR this node is set to use SyncGroup

Variables.Name: bTeleportToExplicitTime
Variables.Description:
If true, teleport to explicit time, does NOT advance time (does not trigger notifies, does not extract Root Motion, etc.)
	Note: using a sync group forces advancing time regardless of what this option is set to.

Variables.Name: ReinitializationBehavior
Variables.Description: What to do when SequenceEvaluator is reinitialized
